text: Deterministic multi-source discovery (Seek, Greenhouse, Lever, Remotive, RemoteOK) — scrapes and normalises listings with no LLM cost. |  | Job Discovery Agent |  | deterministic |  | Active | Run

Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for nuanced writing and format preservation. GPT-4o is a good alternative for speed. Avoid smaller models. |  | Resume Tailoring Agent |  | deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro |  | Active | Run
Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 or GPT-4o. Needs strong creative writing and tone adaptation capabilities. |  | Cover Letter Agent |  | deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro · error |  | Error | Run

The semantic ATS engine that runs inside Match Scoring — embeds each resume against the job description (deterministic, no chat cost). Already shipped; runs as part of fit scoring. |  | ATS Optimization Agent |  | deterministic |  | Active | Run
Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for careful reasoning about truthfulness and evidence verification. |  | Compliance Agent |  | — |  | Planned
Best with GPT-4o for reliable form-filling and browser automation reasoning. |  | Submission Agent |  | — |  | Planned
Deterministic 10-dimension fit scoring + ATS keyword/semantic engine — scores every discovered job with no LLM cost. |  | Match Scoring Agent |  | deterministic |  | Active | Run

Ranks every fit-scored job and selects the best-fit target for tailoring — the matcher node of the live pipeline, now runnable on its own. Deterministic, no LLM cost. |  | Job Matching Agent |  | deterministic |  | Active | Run
Best with GPT-4o-mini — aggregates salary data at scale affordably. |  | Salary Intelligence Agent |  | — |  | Planned
Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for realistic mock interviews and deep reasoning. |  | Interview Prep Agent |  | — |  | Planned
Best with GPT-4o for synthesizing company research from web sources. |  | Company Research Agent |  | — |  | Planned

Surfaces the job's missing keywords from the ATS engine (ATSScore.missing_keywords) — the skill-gap facet of Match Scoring. Already shipped; deterministic, no LLM cost. |  | Skill Gap Agent |  | deterministic |  | Active | Run

Planned: first-touch outbound to a recruiter/contact with no existing thread (a future dedicated OutreachAgent). Inbox triage and reply/follow-up drafting already live in the Email Agent. |  | Recruiter Outreach Agent |  | — |  | Planned

Real Gmail-backed inbox triage, evidence-grounded reply and follow-up drafting, label management and per-thread insights. Sends are approval-gated. Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4. Connect Gmail (Email Center) to activate live send/sync. |  | Email Agent |  | deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro |  | Active | Run
